title: T-062 — UI: TEC-094 Recipe Costing preview (cross-tagged → 10-FINANCE)
prompt: Build per-FG cost preview combining material + routing + overhead per §11A TEC-094. Audit CC-5 dual-owned with 10-FINANCE — Tech-side aggregation only; financial roll-up canonical in 10-FINANCE. Match `costing_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:664-712. RED tests/ui/tec-094-costing.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-094-costing.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Per-FG cost preview using BOM + routing data; defers full roll-up to 10-FINANCE.
pipeline_inputs.details: Sums (component.cost_per_kg × quantity × (1+scrap)) plus routing op cost. Overhead pulled from 10-FINANCE if available, else shown as 'pending'.
acceptance_criteria: Given the preview renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:664-712, then sections (Material / Routing / Overhead / Total) and primitives match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given overhead unavailable, when rendered, then row shows 'pending (10-FINANCE)' badge.
Given BOM missing, when rendered, then preview shows empty-state CTA.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + missing-data states.
